<features>
- observable feature: pink color
- observable feature: wavy lines
- observable feature: sand texture
</features>
<kb>
- IF [observable visual features = wavy lines AND observable visual features = sand texture] THEN [17]
- IF [observable visual features = pink color] THEN [32]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 17 fires because the Query Image exhibits wavy lines and a sand texture.
- The rule for class 32 fires because the Query Image has a pink color.
</rule_check>

<response>17</response>
